name: Inoreader Intelligence Reports
summary: RSS reading product with automated intelligence reporting features.
notes: Useful as a benchmark for reporting UX and scheduled briefing workflows.
Not an agent-first or open integration surface yet.

name: RSSHub
summary: Open source feed generation infrastructure that turns many web sources into RSS.
notes: Important upstream building block for source normalization.
Relevant as infrastructure rather than a briefing product.

name: Readwise CLI
summary: CLI access to saved reading data that can be composed into agent workflows.
notes: Strong bridge between personal knowledge workflows and agent automation.
Depends on the user's upstream Readwise usage.

name: Podwise CLI
summary: Podcast summarization and transcript workflow with CLI and MCP support.
notes: A strong example of vertical tool design for agent consumption.
Good reference for how News Report can expose structured outputs.

name: Hacker News API
summary: Official Hacker News Firebase API. Free, no auth, returns structured JSON.
notes: Good candidate for second real adapter to validate SourceAdapter Protocol.

name: GitHub Trending
summary: GitHub trending repositories. Accessible via RSSHub route /github/trending/daily.
notes: Useful for open-source and developer-tools topics.

name: arXiv RSS Feeds
summary: Academic preprint RSS feeds covering AI, ML, NLP, and more.
notes: Key source for cutting-edge AI/ML research. Available via RSSHub /arxiv/ routes.

name: Kill the Newsletter!
summary: Converts email newsletters into RSS feeds for agent consumption.
notes: Bridges the gap between newsletter-only content and structured feeds.

name: Miniflux
summary: Minimalist self-hosted RSS reader with a clean REST API.
notes: REST API makes it ideal for agent integration. Supports feed management + read state.

name: Lobsters
summary: Technology-focused link aggregation with tag-based RSS feeds.
notes: High signal-to-noise ratio. Tag-based RSS enables topic-specific feeds.

name: Reddit RSS Feeds
summary: Reddit subreddit RSS feeds. Accessible via RSSHub /reddit/subreddit/ routes.
notes: Useful for niche topic monitoring. Rate-limited but functional via RSSHub.

name: YouTube Transcript API
summary: Python API to fetch YouTube video transcripts without an API key.
notes: Enables turning video content into text for briefing generation.

name: Techmeme
summary: Curated tech news aggregator with RSS feed.
notes: High-quality editorial curation. RSS feed provides structured access.

name: Feedly API
summary: RSS aggregator with AI-powered topic tracking and REST API.
notes: Leo AI feature does topic filtering. API requires paid plan.

name: TLDR Newsletter
summary: Daily tech newsletter covering AI, startups, and developer tools.
notes: Good curation quality. Can be converted to RSS via Kill the Newsletter.

name: n8n RSS Trigger
summary: Workflow automation with RSS trigger nodes for feed processing pipelines.
notes: Can orchestrate multi-source feed processing. Self-hostable.
